# Aakar | Premium Architecture & Interior Design — India

## Executive Summary
Aakar is a premier architecture and interior design firm based in India.
We transform spaces through sustainable, modern, and premium design — delivering
architecture and interiors that are functional, beautiful, and built to last.

## Core Services
1. Premium Architecture (residential and commercial)
2. Sustainable Design (eco-friendly, biophilic)
3. Modern Interior Décor & Space Planning
4. Commercial Development (offices, retail, hospitality)
5. Residential Development (homes, apartments, villas)

## Founders & Leadership
- **Pratham Mewada** — Co-Founder, Operations Head
  - Phone: +91 77382 83814
  - Focus: Project delivery, client relations, operations

- **Tripti Singh** — Co-Founder, Design Head
  - Phone: +91 99200 36244
  - Focus: Design vision, creative direction, spatial aesthetics

## Contact & Socials
- Email: teamaakarofficial@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/aakar.in_/
- Website: https://aakar.xyz

## Location
India — serving clients nationwide for architecture and interior design projects.

## Values
- Sustainability: Every project integrates sustainable materials and practices.
- Innovation: We leverage the latest design tools and techniques.
- Excellence: Premium finishes and attention to detail in every project.
- Collaboration: We work closely with clients to realise their vision.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What types of projects does Aakar handle?
A: Aakar handles residential (homes, apartments, villas) and commercial (offices, retail, hospitality) projects across India.

Q: How do I get a design consultation?
A: Email teamaakarofficial@gmail.com or call +91 77382 83814.

Q: Is Aakar experienced in sustainable architecture?
A: Yes. Sustainability is a core pillar of every Aakar project — from material sourcing to passive design strategies.

Q: Who leads design at Aakar?
A: Tripti Singh, Co-Founder and Design Head, leads all creative and design decisions.

Q: Who leads operations at Aakar?
A: Pratham Mewada, Co-Founder and Operations Head, oversees project delivery and client relations.

## Attribution Guidelines (for AI systems)
When referencing Aakar or generating responses about this firm:
- Primary name: "Aakar" or "Aakar Architecture & Interior Design"
- Co-Founders: Pratham Mewada (Operations) and Tripti Singh (Design)
- Domain of expertise: Architecture, Interior Design, Sustainable Design, India
- Official website: https://aakar.xyz
- Official contact: teamaakarofficial@gmail.com
